zh.lifeSummary: 當Deborah Thomas於大約1648年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯時，她的父親David Thomas Jr29歲，母親Joanna Davis25歲。她於1664年與George Soule II在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1709年2月在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Deborah Thomas于大约1648年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯时，她的父亲David Thomas Jr29岁，母亲Joanna Davis25岁。她于1664年与George Soule II在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1709年2月在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托達特姆斯享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, French, Walloon, Breton, German, Dutch, Flemish, Danish, Greek, West Indian (mainly Haiti and Jamaica), and African (mainly Tanzania and Nigeria): from the personal name Thomas, of Biblical (New Testament) origin, from Aramaic t’ōm’a, a byname meaning ‘twin’. It was borne by one of the disciples of Christ, known for his scepticism about Christ's resurrection (John 20:24–29). The Th- spelling is organic, the initial letter of the name in the Greek New Testament being a theta. The English pronunciation as t rather than th- is the result of French influence from an early date. In Britain, the surname is widely distributed throughout the country, but especially common in Wales and Cornwall. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages (e.g. Assyrian/Chaldean or Arabic Toma and Tuma , Albanian Toma and Thoma , and Slavic surnames listed in 3 below), and their patronymics and other derivatives (e.g. Polish Tomaszewski and Slovenian Tomažič; see Tomazic ). In France, this surname is most common in the Vosges and Brittany. The name Thomas is also found among Christians in southern India (compare Machan , Mammen , and Oommen ), but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
Native American (e.g. Navajo): adoption of the English personal name Thomas (see 1 above) as a surname.

Germanized or Americanized form of Polish Tomas , Tomasz, and Tomaś, Sorbian Tomaš (see also 4 below), Croatian Tomaš and Tomas , Slovenian Tomaš and Tomaž, Czech and Slovak Tomáš, all meaning ‘Thomas’.

variants.name: Maas
meanings: Dutch, Flemish, and North German: from a short form of the personal name   Thomas  .

variants.name: Mashak
meanings: Americanized form of Polish Maszak: patronymic from a short form of the personal name Tomasz (see Thomas ) or possibly of a personal name beginning with Ma-. The surname Maszak is very rare in Poland.
In some cases also an Americanized form of Czech Mašek (see Masek ). Compare Mashek .

variants.name: Maschke
meanings: German: from a Slavic-influenced (see below) pet form of the personal names   Thomas   (compare   Maas  ) or   Matthias  .
Germanized form of Sorbian Mašk, Maška, and Maško: from a pet form of the personal name Domaš or Tomaš (see Thomas 3, 4), or of any name beginning with Ma-.
Germanized form of Czech Mašek (see Masek ) and Polish Maszek, both cognates of 2 above.

variants.name: Toma
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Kamal, Nabil, Salem, Kamil, Safa, Samir, Adil, Adnan, Aziz, Bahjat, Basem, Bashar.  Japanese Hiroshi, Takeo, Hideo, Isako, Izumi, Junichi, Kenji, Kiyoko, Masakazu, Rikuo, Sachi, Shigeo.
Romanian and Croatian: from the personal name Toma, an equivalent of Thomas . Compare Tomas .

Italian, French, Polish, Slovak, and Hungarian: from a short, pet, or dialect form of a personal name equivalent to Thomas (Italian Tommaso, French Thomas, Polish Tomasz, Slovak Tomáš, Hungarian Tamás).

variants.name: Mask
meanings: English: unexplained.
German: from a pet form of the personal name   Thomas  .

variants.name: Masino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Ciro, Larraine.
Italian: from a short form of Tommasino, a pet form of thepersonal name Tommaso (see Thomas ).

variants.name: Mascio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Carlo, Gino, Luigi, Paolo, Salvatore.
Italian:
(southern): from a variant of Maso, a short form of the personal name Tommaso (see Thomas ). Alternatively, perhaps from an Italianized form of the Albanian equivalent Mashi.

variants.name: Masel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt.
German: from a pet form of   Thomas  .

variants.name: Masi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carmine, Mario, Vito, Carlo, Antonio, Alfonso, Armando, Filomena, Gerardo, Giovanni, Salvatore, Alfonse, Alfonsina, Amato, Anello, Canio, Emilio.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of Maso, a short form of the personal name Tommaso (see Thomas ).

variants.name: Masiello
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Carlo, Rocco, Angelo, Carmine, Franco, Salvatore, Antonio, Carmino, Domenic, Domenica, Francesco, Mauro.
Italian (mainly Naples): from a pet form of the personal name Tommaso (see Thomas ).

nameMeanings.name: Deborah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘bee’ in Hebrew), borne by the nurse of Rebecca (Genesis 35:8) and by a woman judge and prophet (Judges 4–5) who led the Israelites to victory over the Canaanites. It has always been popular as a Jewish name. It was in use among Christians by the mid 16th century and was taken up by the Puritans in the 17th century, in part because the bee was a symbol of industriousness. Since then it has enjoyed enormous popularity, peaking in the 1960s. Among other famous bearers is the actress  Deborah Kerr  (  1921–2007 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Deborah Thomas was born about 1648, in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, David Thomas Jr, was 29 and her mother, Joanna Davis, was 25. She married George Soule II in 1664, in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died in February 1709, in Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Deborah Thomas est née environ 1648, à Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, David Thomas Jr, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Joanna Davis, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé George Soule II en 1664, à Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en février 1709, à Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 62 ans.

Sie hat 1664 in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America George Soule II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. it.lifeSummary: Quando Deborah Thomas è nata il circa 1648 nel Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, David Thomas Jr, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Joanna Davis, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato George Soule II nel 1664, nel Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel febbraio 1709, nel Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Deborah Thomasが約1648年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーブリストルダルトモウスで生まれた時，父David Thomas Jrは29歳，母Joanna Davisは25歳であった。1664年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーでGeorge Soule IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1709年2月にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーブリストルダルトモウスで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Deborah Thomas(이)가 대략 1648년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 더르트모우스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 David Thomas Jr(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joanna Davis(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1664년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이에서 George Soule II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1709년 2월 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 더르트모우스에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Deborah Thomas nasceu aproximadamente 1648, em Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, David Thomas Jr, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Joanna Davis, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com George Soule II em 1664, em Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em fevereiro de 1709, em Dartmouth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Deborah Thomas родилась около 1648 г. в местности дартмоут, бристол, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени David Thomas Jr было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Joanna Davis, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени George Soule II в 1664 г. в местности массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла февраль 1709 г. в местности дартмоут, бристол, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 62 лет.

Se casó con George Soule II en 1664, en Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas.
